nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: If I need to write a longer email that needs to be in a professional tone, I will often use AI to give me a basic outline

nodes.label: AI's ability to produce authentic voice
nodes.label_negative: AI output sounding generic or inauthentic
nodes.grounding_span: I will change little things to make it sound more authentic and human

nodes.label: AI for personalized tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI use for tasks involving personal information
nodes.grounding_span: Generally anything involving personal information, I will do myself

nodes.label: Effort-benefit ratio of AI use
nodes.label_negative: Effort of using AI outweighing benefit for small tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Short emails and reports I will write myself because I feel it is more work to open an AI to do it

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: When writing a cover letter I found it particularly helpful. It helped me organize all my experiences in a coherent way

nodes.label: AI impact on skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: Skill atrophy due to AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I think about losing skills because AI is doing it for me. But I do a lot of writing on my own as well so I feel that helps keep my skills

nodes.label: Authentic human communication
nodes.grounding_span: make it sound more authentic and human

nodes.label: Security and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: My company has a strict policy for not using anyone's personal information

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it is more work to open an AI to do it

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I do a lot of writing on my own as well so I feel that helps keep my skills

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: When writing a cover letter I found it particularly helpful

nodes.label: Concern about skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I think about losing skills because AI is doing it for me

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine I will use it more as it gets better and better

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: I feel it is more work to open an AI to do it

nodes.label: Authenticity-driven customization
nodes.grounding_span: I will change little things to make it sound more authentic and human
